overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a brown coat and hat running along a winding mountain trail. The journey transitions from rocky open terrain through a dense pine forest and back to rocky canyon paths, featuring a brief encounter with a horseback rider early in the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with scattered pines

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from ahead and passes by on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: character running steadily along the mountain trail toward the forest

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large gray rock formation lining the left side of the trail
rocky mountain peak visible in the distance against the sky
sparse pine trees dotting the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The character runs along an open rocky mountain trail with a large rock wall on the left. A rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by, heading in the opposite direction. The path leads toward a forested area with scattered pine trees visible ahead.

events.description: trail enters dense pine forest with tall trees surrounding the path on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the shaded forest trail

entered.detail: dense forest of tall pine trees creating a canopy over the trail
fallen tree trunk lying beside the path
large moss-covered boulder visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a dense pine forest where tall trees surround the path, filtering the sunlight. The open mountain views disappear behind the character as the forest encloses the trail. A large rock outcrop becomes visible in the distance on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path with rock outcrops

events.description: path curves to the right around large rock formations

agents.ego_description: following the curving trail to the right as it winds around rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the dense forest as the trail curves to the right. A large rock outcrop on the right side grows increasingly prominent as the character approaches and passes it. The path remains shaded by the tall pine canopy.

events.description: exiting the dense forest into open rocky mountain terrain with large boulders and canyon walls

agents.ego_description: running through the rocky canyon landscape with steep walls on the left

entered.detail: steep rock wall rising immediately on the left side of the trail
scattered large boulders and rocky terrain covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest into an open rocky canyon with steep stone walls on the left and scattered boulders on the right. The trail continues through this rugged mountain terrain under bright sunlight, with the dense pine forest now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from open rocky terrain through a dense pine forest and back into a rugged canyon. It begins on an open path beside a large rock wall, where a rider on horseback passes by in the opposite direction as the trail leads toward a distant treeline. As the character moves forward, the open mountain views disappear and the scene shifts into a dense pine forest where tall trees enclose the path and filter the sunlight. The camera then follows the trail as it curves to the right, passing a prominent rock outcrop while remaining under the shaded canopy of the forest. Finally, the character emerges from the trees into a bright, open rocky canyon characterized by steep stone walls and scattered boulders.
